title: 3rd Life
description: Zrinksky's recreation of Grian's 3rd Life with all the original features
body:
This is Zrinksky's recreation of Grians's 3rd Life.
It features:
- Lives
- Name colours
- Spectator on final death
- Pre set world border
- Custom recipes as seen on Youtube

Admins must just make sure that players spawn at 0 0 to work correctly :)
